pkgmetadata.longdescription: .. image httpstravis-ci.orgwireserviceleather.png target httpstravis-ci.orgwireserviceleather alt Build status.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypidwleather.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypileather alt PyPI downloads.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypivleather.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypileather alt Version.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypilleather.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypileather alt License.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypipyversionsleather.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypileather alt Support Python versionsLeather is the Python charting library for those who need charts now and dont care if theyre perfect.Leather isnt picky. Its rough. It gets dirty. It looks sexy just hanging on the back of a chair. Leather doesnt need your accessories. Leather is how Snake Plissken would make charts.Get itImportant links Documentation httpleather.rtfd.io Repository httpsgithub.comwireserviceleather Issues httpsgithub.comwireserviceleatherissues
